title: 010 Totems
summary: 010 Totems explores how generative tools can translate Rotterdam’s hyperlocal culture into material and moving form. Inspired by experimental work from W+K Amsterdam, I developed an art-directed workflow moving from text-to-image, through image-to-3D, to animation and physical production. The process resulted in ten Delftware-inspired figurines based on recognisable everyday scenes, insider references and the city’s gedogen culture. Combining AI generation with manual selection, 3D printing and hand-finishing, the project turns informal local stories into a small archive of digital and physical objects.

glossary.definition: A Dutch practice of tolerating something officially prohibited, provided it stays within agreed limits.
